content.en:
Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace is now weaker and the easiest to attack.

The Ice Ghost Organization has always been extremely cautious, even if its strength is far superior to these supreme forces, it does not want to attack the headquarters of all supreme forces at the same time, it still wants to come one by one.

In this case, the probability of accidents is low.

If you deal with all the supreme forces at the same time, then you must separate, and even a peak realm god can deal with an entire supreme force, which is prone to accidents, and may even be killed.

Against a weaker territory, the Ice Ghost Organization doesn't want to lose any of its members, and once one falls, the operation is not worth it.

"Yes!"

A group of peak realm gods responded one after another.

......

Taihao Tianzhu Palace.

Because the peak realm god of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace hesitated for a moment, he did not flee at the first time, but now he can't get out, and the passage leading to the Death Void is useless, and he can no longer enter the Death Void.

That's what being blocked, unless they can break it.

And at this moment, the pinnacle realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace were desperately attacking the enchantment arranged by the superdimensional sealing beads, but their strength was still too weak to break this enchantment at all.

Suddenly.

Rumble!!!!!

The realm of the boundary crack where Taihao Tianchao Palace was located was torn apart by the ice ghost organization.

A group of peak realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization broke into here, and this scene made Taihao Tianchao Palace extremely desperate.

They didn't attack the Ice Ghost Organization because they knew that to attack was to seek death.

Thereupon.

These pinnacle realm gods begged for mercy one by one.

And the Blood Realm God of the Ice Ghost Organization said: "We are here to rob, take out all the extradimensional resources, remember, don't leave any resources behind." "

"Good!"

The pinnacle realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace responded one after another.

Immediately, they took out a large amount of extra-dimensional resources, and also took out extra-dimensional resources from the treasure house.

"Is that all?"

The Blood Realm God asked with some disappointment.

"That's all!"

The pinnacle realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace responded one after another.

But at this moment, the Blood Realm God took out a special super dimensional secret treasure, and the super dimensional secret treasure released a cyan light, and this cyan light penetrated into this boundary crack, whether it was the treasure house or the inside of their bodies, they were all infiltrated into it.

The Blood Realm God sensed it and was furious.

"You still dare to hide so many extra-dimensional resources, and the extra-dimensional resources you take out are only less than half, and you !!! looking for death."

The words of the Blood Realm God caused the faces of these peak Realm Gods to change drastically.

They also didn't expect that the Blood Realm God would even have a super-dimensional secret treasure that could spy on super-dimensional resources.

Who is willing to hand over all the resources, no one willing, and the peak realm gods of Taihao Tianchao Palace don't want to, and some of the peak realm gods are still affected by the super-dimensional assimilation, if there are no resources, the super-dimensional storm comes, they have no resources to cultivate, and they still can't hold on in the future, and it is still the end of death.

That's why they took the risk of hiding some resources.

The results have now been discovered.

"We're willing to take it all!"

These pinnacle realm gods said.

"It's night!"

With a wave of his hand, the peak realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization made a move.

Rumble!!!

In an instant, the pinnacle realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace were killed one by one.

In a short period of time, the peak realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace were all wiped out.

"Destroy this place too!"

The Ice Ghost Organization ordered.

Endless light covered all parts of this rift realm, and countless realm gods, eternal realms, and weaker beings were all covered in light, and they fell without the power to resist.

The endless sounds of despair were gradually extinguished by the light, and it was not long before there was no trace of life in this boundary rift.

For the Ice Ghost Organization, they don't know how many times they have done such a thing.

"Take all the extra-dimensional resources away, and as for the ordinary resources, don't worry about it!"

They can't look down on ordinary resources, after all, they can't improve their strength, although a large number of ordinary resources can be traded out, and they can also get a lot of extra-dimensional resources by slowly accumulating them.

It's a pity that their Ice Ghost Organization rarely makes transactions, they are the dark forces that rob, and if they make more transactions, the possibility of being targeted is too great.

So, they rob these ordinary resources, and there is no place to use them.

Soon.

The members of the Ice Ghost Organization plundered a lot of the extra-dimensional resources of the Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace, and then began to take action against the next supreme force.

Soon after, the next supreme force was destroyed.

After all, the possibility of really taking out all the extradimensional resources is too low, and everyone will hide some of them, thinking that they will not be discovered.

......

Two Realms Gate.

At this time, the expression of the Liangyi Realm God was extremely solemn, and he and the other peak realm gods were attacking the enchantment formed by the Extradimensional Sealing Bead, but they couldn't break it.

Subsequently.

Some of the pinnacle realm gods of the supreme forces met by projection. []

"'Everyone, what should I do, that mysterious alien force is destroying one supreme force after another. This time it was different from the Demon Seed Abyss Will Incarnation, which could not hold out for long, but this mysterious force could continue to invade. Moreover, they have a lot of super dimensional secret treasures, and there are also super dimensional secret treasures that break through the super dimensional formation, and we can't resist these mysterious foreign powerhouses through the super dimensional formation. "

The Shinto of the Liangyi Realm.

"Sitting back is not the best choice, if the other party comes to the door one by one, then we all have to die. For now, there is no other way but to join forces to fight to the death, or to join forces to break the barrier and rush out!"

"Everyone, come to my Two Realms Gate, and try to break the barrier from the Two Realms Gate. If you can't break it, fight them again!(Wang Haozhao)"

The other peak realm gods listened to the words of the Liangyi Realm gods, and they were extremely embarrassed one by one, but they didn't disagree with this method, but if they did, they would inevitably abandon the forces they were in, and at most they would be able to take away their close ones.

But soon, they all agreed, after all, there was too much time, there was no extra time to think about it.

Subsequently.

Some peak realm gods took their relatives with them, and some seed geniuses were taken out of the realm of the rift and thrown to various places in the eternal realm, maybe there was still hope to survive some blows.

However.

From beginning to end, Ye Tian didn't panic too much.

He didn't deal with the Ice Ghost Organization in the first place, after all, he didn't know the strength of the Ice Ghost Organization, if he made a rash move, in case his copy body was defeated, maybe there would be no time to copy the body, and the Ice Ghost Organization would definitely enter the Endless Rift Realm as soon as possible.

So, he only has one chance.
